  {
    "id": "control_logger",
    "type": "function",
    "name": "Control Logger",
    "func": "// Log control decisions and system status\nconst data = msg.payload;\nconst logEntry = {\n    timestamp: data.timestamp,\n    system_status: data.system_status,\n    load_sharing: data.load_sharing,\n    commands_issued: data.commands.length,\n    commands: data.commands.map(cmd => ({\n        device: cmd.device,\n        action: cmd.action,\n        value: cmd.value,\n        reason: cmd.reason\n    }))\n};\n\n// Store in context for dashboard\nconst controlHistory = context.get('controlHistory') || [];\ncontrolHistory.push(logEntry);\n\n// Keep only last 100 entries\nif (controlHistory.length > 100) {\n    controlHistory.shift();\n}\n\ncontext.set('controlHistory', controlHistory);\nglobal.set('lastControlDecision', logEntry);\n\nmsg.payload = logEntry;\nreturn msg;",
    "outputs": 1,
    "noerr": 0,
    "x": 600,
    "y": 240,
    "z": "control_logic_flow",
    "wires": [
      ["dashboard_control_update"]
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "write_confirmation",
    "type": "function",
    "name": "Write Confirmation",
    "func": "// Log successful/failed write operations\nconst confirmation = {\n    timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),\n    device: msg.payload.device || 'unknown',\n    success: !msg.error,\n    error: msg.error || null,\n    address: msg.payload.address,\n    value: msg.payload.value\n};\n\n// Store confirmation for monitoring\nconst writeHistory = context.get('writeHistory') || [];\nwriteHistory.push(confirmation);\n\nif (writeHistory.length > 50) {\n    writeHistory.shift();\n}\n\ncontext.set('writeHistory', writeHistory);\n\nmsg.payload = confirmation;\nreturn msg;",
    "outputs": 1,
    "noerr": 0,
    "x": 1200,
    "y": 180,
    "z": "control_logic_flow",
    "wires": [
      ["command_status_logger"]
    ]
  },
  {
    "id": "dashboard_control_update",
    "type": "debug",
    "name": "Control Dashboard Update",
    "active": true,
    "tosidebar": true,
    "console": false,
    "tostatus": false,
    "complete": "payload",
    "targetType": "msg",
    "statusVal": "",
    "statusType": "auto",
    "x": 820,
    "y": 240,
    "z": "control_logic_flow"
  },
  {
    "id": "command_status_logger",
    "type": "debug",
    "name": "Command Status",
    "active": true,
    "tosidebar": true,
    "console": false,
    "tostatus": false,
    "complete": "payload",
    "targetType": "msg",
    "statusVal": "",
    "statusType": "auto",
    "x": 1200,
    "y": 240,
    "z": "control_logic_flow"
  },
  {
    "id": "control_timer",
    "type": "inject",
    "name": "Control Loop Timer",
    "props": [
      {
        "p": "payload"
      },
      {
        "p": "topic",
        "vt": "str"
      }
    ],
    "repeat": "5",
    "crontab": "",
    "once": true,
    "onceDelay": "10",
    "topic": "control/timer",
    "payload": "",
    "payloadType": "date",
    "x": 180,
    "y": 140,
    "z": "control_logic_flow",
    "wires": [
      ["control_coordinator"]
    ]
  }
]
